docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBERTSON, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCGHEE, DALENA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $580.00, THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED BY THE PARTIES ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT ASSAULTED PLAINTIFF. BECAUSE THE ASSAULT DID NOT CAUSE PHYSICAL DAMAGES, THE COURT AWARDS NOMINAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SUBPOENA ISSUED TO VICKY PESEK, 1150 GALILEO;SF,CA. 94133
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DALENA MCGHEE SET FOR NOV-17-2010 IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO MAR-16-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN 506. IF JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED, THE PARTIES NEED NOT APPEAR. IF NO APPEARANCES, COURT WILL ORDER ENTRY OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
